stemHtml: An aircraft is CAT II capable and is approaching an airfield. Which of the following runway minima would be a suitable option?

options.a: Runway with a DH of 100 ft and RVR 275 m.
options.b: Runway with a DH of 50 ft and RVR 100 m.
options.c: Runway with a DH of 100 ft and RVR 200 m.
options.d: Runway with a DH of 100 ft and RVR 300 m.
